reviews.title: Would like to thank the delivery team…
reviews.body: Would like to thank the delivery team Kevin and Chris for the table they delivered and set up, done a brilliant job. They was on time, polite and worked efficiently to do the job… thanks again

reviews.title: Great delivery experience.
reviews.body: Delivery team of Blaise and Stewart were great, phoned on the way and came when expected, moved the heavy parcels where I wanted them. All good, thanks.

reviews.title: From initial purchase to delivery excellent…
reviews.body: From initial purchase to delivery everything went as planned. Received the call first thing on the morning of the booked delivery date to advise when Dave A and Paul Y would arrive and they did, on time. Very happy guys who did a great job and made sure everything was put together well. Cleared away all the packaging, so no mess.  They were a pleasure to have in the house, and I’m very happy to wr

reviews.title: Great delivery service & lovely sofa
reviews.body: Great delivery service from Stefan and Richard, and very happy with the sofa!

reviews.title: Ease of buying online from a trusted…
reviews.body:
Ease of buying online from a trusted and reputable company, quick and easy delivery confirmation followed by seemless delivery: Stefan and Richard were prompt polite and professional - what more could you ask for.

All round great experience!

reviews.title: Happy customer
reviews.body: The guys who delivered our new mattress (Callum and Luke) were very helpful and respectful. Very happy with the purchase and the delivery.

reviews.title: Had a table delivered
reviews.body:
Had a table, bench and chairs delivery today. Gary R & Jordan were on time, polite and efficient.
No complaints

reviews.title: Jake and Stephen provided a very…
reviews.body: Jake and Stephen provided a very efficient service. They were extremely polite and friendly. Great representatives for Barker and Stonehouse.

reviews.title: Fast delivery and friendly staff
reviews.body:
Fast delivery great product.
Liam and Wojciech delivered the item, were super friendly and built the furniture in no time. Great lads. 5 star service.

reviews.title: From visiting Paul in the Nottingham…
reviews.body:
From visiting Paul in the Nottingham store, to the items being delivered by Luke and Alex the experience of shopping at Barker and Stonehouse was first class
Many thanks
Ian & Sue Shelley

reviews.title: Bad quality, chairs falling after within a few months!
reviews.body:
I’m so upset with my 8 ‘Quebec’ dining chairs I bought only 8 months ago! They’re all falling apart, bad quality stitching! 
Dining chairs are supposed to last many years! The ones I had before looked new after 10 years!! I wish I can attach photos to show the quality.

All the company did was offer me an option to buy a new one for 50% off! Why would I want the same chair if it’s bad quality?

reviews.title: Really helpful staff
reviews.body: Really helpful staff - from sales to delivery. 5* delivery today from JamieS & Don. 🤩

reviews.title: Paul S and Tapiwa what type
reviews.body: Paul S and Tapiwa what type? Absolutely amazing. Lovely attitude very helpful and even helped us because the peace arrived damaged. And they told us exactly what steps to take and what to do next. Absolute perfection!

reviews.title: Efficient and friendly service
reviews.body: Chris and Cal were really efficient and friendly when delivering and putting together the sofa and dining table. They explained how to undo and re connect the sofa if ever required and also asked my preferences on where to position the furniture.

reviews.title: Great experience
reviews.body:
Delivery guys Jake and Marty did a great job, couldn’t be happier with the delivery process.
Very happy with the furniture, great quality and looks amazing.

reviews.title: Punctual
reviews.body: Punctual. Phoned before arriving. Installed the furniture and took all rubbish

reviews.title: Received dining  tables and chairs just…
reviews.body:
Received dining  tables and chairs just now  delivery guys Liam snd Wojciech great. 
Pleasant and helpful.
However the leather chairs are poorly scratched and require replacing.

reviews.title: The staff at the Hove store
reviews.body: The staff at the Hove store, Katie and Jago offered exceptional customer service to me and my fiancée. They listened carefully to our ideas, made great suggestions and helped us purchase some chairs and a rug. So lovely to encounter relaxed and happy people clearly passionate about their work.  Thank you

reviews.title: What else can I buy from Barker and Stonehouse
reviews.body:
Easy to order. Kept up to date with delivery time and date. Morning of the delivery got my call. Thirty minutes later my table was here.
Paul S and Tapiwa quickly put the table together. Both were very pleasant. They took away the packaging. 
I'm now looking to see what other furniture I can buy from Barker and Stonehouse. Would definitely recommend.

reviews.title: Quick delivery really friendly chaps…
reviews.body: Quick delivery really friendly chaps (Dave A and Pauk Y) all wrapping taken away really pleased

reviews.title: Lovely environment and excellent…
reviews.body: Lovely environment and excellent service as usual - many thanks!

reviews.title: Great delivery team
reviews.body: The delivery team that delivered our mattress were great. Thank you Mark and Lewis :)

reviews.title: Excellent service
reviews.body: From the sales consultant Alex in store, to the two guys, Will and Lewis who delivered the furniture, they were all friendly, helpful, informative and a credit to the company. I would certainly recommend Lee Longlands for their furniture, and also for their excellent customer service.

reviews.title: Whole experience was excellent.
reviews.body:
Very pleased with the Tempur bed and mattress. 
Great help from the Peterborough store staff when choosing our new bed.
Delivery was brilliant, Richard and Will were on time, were efficient, careful, friendly and helpful.

reviews.title: Helpful and professional from start to finish
reviews.body: Helpful and professional from start to finish, from Mandy in the Leamington showroom to Jay, Carl and James on delivery. Excellent communication and we love our new sofa!

reviews.title: Furniture delivery
reviews.body: Tony and Kane delivered my sofa and chair today and were very helpful and professional and nothing was too much trouble

reviews.title: Super service!
reviews.body:
Just taken delivery of our recliner chair. Superb quality product. Service in store was great. Had decided we would collect the product, to save cost, and then had a call to say they would deliver it anyway, for free! 
Contacted us 
 just prior to delivery date. We had to rearrange due to being on holiday and they were most accommodating finding an alternative date. 
The two delivery guys. Jay and

reviews.title: All around wonderful experience
reviews.body:
Easy to order, and kept informed at all stages.
But the best part was the delivery, the drivers were lovely, Richard and Will, they called to advise us of delivery time, and they delivered at the time arranged, they built the furniture and cleared up after themselves, very friendly and helpful.
The furniture which i ordered was beautiful.
A perfect experience 
Thank you

reviews.title: Tony & Kane, Best delivery team.
reviews.body: Alibaba was great in the Pboro branch, but the bonus was the delivery team, Tony & Kane. Nothing was too much trouble. Buy with confidence

reviews.title: Glass table, chairs and bed, South Wales
reviews.body: Richard and Will let me know when they would be arriving. They were polite and focussed on the job. Richard explained how to handle our new table and to look after it. Will cleared everything (all packaging) afterwards and together they were an efficient team. We were very pleased with the service from start to finish. Thank you both. Terry and Eira.

reviews.title: Wonderful products
reviews.body: Wonderful products, fantastic staff and service. The shop manager even called me in the evening to confirm the details of my order, because I made a slight change to the upholstery last minute and he wanted to double check. Very happy

reviews.title: Really went out their way
reviews.body: Really went out their way, to advise us ..friendly and approachable.

reviews.title: Lee Longlands  - lives up to our experience again
reviews.body:
We have a history of ordering from Lee Longlands going back many years and their products are always of a high quality. 
On this occasion, our item of furniture was delivered by Lewis and Kane who took great care in locating the item to our satisfaction and taking every piece of rubbish with them. You can be proud of your Staff.
We have emailed our comments as well to Customer Service.

reviews.title: Excellent service and a most helpful…
reviews.body: Excellent service and a most helpful staff member.

reviews.title: Fabulous Service, Beautiful Goods
reviews.body: Lee and Nathan did a sterling job of delivering and assembling our sofa set, cuddler and dining room table and chairs. They were polite, efficient and tidy, despite it being an impossibly hot day (over 30 degrees celsius!) Highly recommend Lee Longlands as the quality is superb.

reviews.title: All’s well that ends well
reviews.body:
I made arrangements for an item of furniture to be delivered to our local Lee Longland store for me to see.
 When I arrived to view the item it would appear that it was not there.
    I returned a couple of days later, having been assured that the item was now available for me to view. I was served by Jake and his reaction to the problem was excellent. I have bought the item and am very pleased wi

reviews.title: An efficient and friendly service.
reviews.body:
An efficient and friendly service.
Kane and Jay phoned to confirm delivery time and they duly delivered the chair on time which they unpacked and assembled.
They were courteous and quick.

reviews.title: Personal service and patience
reviews.body: Personal service and patience . There is care and patience and questions properly answered. We went in several times before we made a decision. There is no excessive sales push which is really pleasant

reviews.title: Lee Longlands staff at the Bristol…
reviews.body: Lee Longlands staff at the Bristol store are nothing short of amazing! James the Manager, helped me resolve a situation with an order I placed, when it was most needed, following a life changing set of circumstances almost immediately after placing the order. 12 months later, I went back to see James and I’m now in possession of not only a beautiful chair, but comfort that’s needed more than ever,

reviews.title: Our Mattress was delivered this morning…
reviews.body:
Our Mattress was delivered this morning by Tony & Carl . We were kept well informed of the delivery schedule and delivered with in the stated time .
Both were well presented plus delivery managed very well . With thanks

reviews.title: Just perfect in every way
reviews.body:
Found the perfect sofas at an amazing price in store.  Unfortunately we were in the process of moving house and had nowhere to store them.  No problem at all for the staff, really helpful ladies kept me informed of stock levels and I returned 5 weeks later when I finally had the keys to order which was when I was delighted to find that they had been reduced by a further £1000. 

Kept informed by d

reviews.title: My dining table came with a small black…
reviews.body: My dining table came with a small black mark literally less than a week ago and they seem this not a fault and told me to go to the Ombudsman. Complaints team have no ounce of customer service and was not willing to help. Just said as we’re not a fault basically sod off. I’ve asked can they examine it so they can even see what I mean as let’s face it pictures are not the true thing and is 100 not

reviews.title: Dave and Darren did a great job…
reviews.body: Dave and Darren did a great job delivering our new bed today. Thank you so much, Sally

reviews.title: Staff ( Janet O ) in Housing Units… and Dave and Darren delivery chaps
reviews.body:
Staff ( Janet O ) in Housing Units store bedroom dept was very friendly and more than helpful. No rush, answered all enquiries, an infinite amount of knowledge and patience . It was a pleasure meeting and dealing with her. Nothing was too much and we did have quite a few laughs . We’ll be back Janet . 
Dave & Darren who delivered the bed were second to none. Arrived on time, assembled furniture ,

reviews.title: Great service
reviews.body: Great service, delayed delivery for as long as I needed, quality is great, Joe and Craig delivery men was brilliant, couldn’t fault them, highly recommend

reviews.title: Great delivery service
reviews.body: The delivery time was communicated well in advance, as indicated with a call 30 minutes prior to confirm. Rick and Phill were polite/friendly and helpful.

reviews.title: New furniture
reviews.body: On time and delivered by 2 thoughtful and polite gentlemen namely Lee and David

reviews.title: Rick & Phill - nice guys good service
reviews.body: Rick & Phill were very friendly delivery men and handled packages with care & delivery was nice and prompt so was not waiting around all day. Would definitely recommend

reviews.title: Lee and David brought in and ensembles…
reviews.body: Lee and David brought in and ensembles my table. Did a great job thanks guys

reviews.title: Efficient delivery men
reviews.body: Efficient delivery men, Lee and David. They took away the packaging. They put the cushions in place.

reviews.title: Very professional service from Rick and…
reviews.body: Very professional service from Rick and Phil, went the extra mile to ensure the furniture was delivered even though it was an awkward delivery. Would highly recommend both of them!!  A++++

reviews.title: Great service for our new garden furniture
reviews.body: From purchasing our new garden furniture through to delivery we were kept informed of when our item will turn up, on delivery day the drivers Rick & Phil gave me a curtesy call 30mins before they arrived and delivered it into our back garden, overall a great service and a great product which we are looking forward to using.

reviews.title: Two great helpful deliverers
reviews.body: Two great helpful deliverers Lee and David

reviews.title: Great job by Lee & David
reviews.body: Great job by Lee & David, friendly, efficient (delivery chaps) from HU

reviews.title: Garden furniture
reviews.body: Arthur the delivery man, delivered our garden furniture single handedly. He was very pleasant and efficient. He didn't leave until he was sure we were completely satisfied. We are very pleased with the furniture, good quality and sturdy. We can't wait for some sun to enable us to enjoy it.

reviews.title: Customer care terrible
reviews.body:
Really bad experiences with Housing Units send numerous messages and telephone calls regarding my bulgati TOASTER being faulty.  NO customer care at all totally ignored.  Will never buy from this company again also will never buy bulgati again.  I feel like I've been scammed KEEP AWAY.

Your have replied stating I'm out of warranty, but if you had of dealt with the query at the time I was within m

reviews.title: The delivery was early and Lee & David…
reviews.body: The delivery was early and Lee & David were very good

reviews.title: Fabulous professional staff
reviews.body:
Fabulous professional staff , especially Lee and David 
Delivering new sofas 
Respected property, on time, delivered with care
First Class service from purchase to delivery 
Faultless

reviews.title: Excellent staff,plenty of choice.
reviews.body: Excellent staff,plenty of choice.

reviews.title: Polite staff who were knowledgeable…
reviews.body: Polite staff who were knowledgeable about the products. They contacted me via mobile phone as soon as the fitting was available for collection. It was well packaged and arrived in perfect condition.

reviews.title: Quality furniture and quality service
reviews.body: I ordered a garden patio set and when unpacking we noticed a small mark on one of the cushions. I took a photo and sent an email to Cox and Cox saying I was very happy with the furniture but disappointed with the mark on it. I had a very prompt reply from Farad who swiftly dealt with the matter to my satisfaction. I wouldn’t hesitate to buy further items from Cox and Cox as they are of good qualit

reviews.title: Firstly I paid for next day delivery…
reviews.body: Firstly I paid for next day delivery and the order showed up two days late , this was a wedding gift so really inconvenient. I was given the delivery charge back but was made to feel like they were doing me a huge favour. Then a return request was done which according to them takes 48hrs and its been 4 days so far!! Seriously how can it take 4 days to give a customer your return address!! First an

reviews.title: Where are the Customer Service team?
reviews.body:
I have placed an order yesterday for next day delivery (prior to the 12 noon cutoff), it’s now nearly 3pm on the delivery day, I’ve received no tracking or dispatch email, I’ve tried to online chat them (switched off), called - waited on hold for 10 mins to then go to an answer machine, tried social media messaging (left unread) and emailed them - could be upto 5 days for a reply.
This is giving m

reviews.title: No impressed I still haven't received…
reviews.body: No impressed I still haven't received my order placed end March 26 when it said delivery early April. Have contacted them a few times by live chat to be told item out of stock til end May so delivery beg June and that my order was a priority. Now they are not on live chat and not answering the phone. They have over £1000 of mine. Are they going bust??

reviews.title: Beautiful blue linen cushion cover
reviews.body:
The linen cushion cover is a beautiful shade of blue, high quality material and well-finished - highly recommended.

I’ve knocked off one star as no tracking number was provided, so I wasn’t sure when to expect the delivery. Zoya in Customer Service was very helpful in resolving the matter, and the package turned up soon after I was supplied with a tracking number.

reviews.title: Risky financial position- avoid
reviews.body:
I ordered some dining chairs at the end of March. The website said they’d be delivered in 5 days but I got a date for delivery a few weeks later. The chairs didn’t arrive on the day - having spent all day in waiting for them. 
I requested a refund, back in April, and here we are on 27th May with no refund as of yet. When I email and call I’m told that it’s being processed and it’ll take a few more

reviews.title: Lovely customer service from Zoya
reviews.body: Lovely customer service from Zoya, who stepped in quickly and helped resolve my issue, i would definitely recommend Cox & Cox for interesting, quality products and great customer service. Thanks Zoya

reviews.title: Great customer service
reviews.body: Great customer service

reviews.title: Dreadful customer service!!
reviews.body: I wouldn’t even give them one star if zero was an option! They have beautiful things but when things go wrong their customer service is dreadful!! I’ve been waiting nearly two months for a side table I ordered as they sent the wrong item! Since then it’s been ME doing ALL of the chasing and they never get my emails I keep being asked to send and then they don’t follow up! And it takes ages for the

reviews.title: Very Impressed with customer service and logistics
reviews.body: Qaiser has been a great help with placing an order for a parasol & granite base.  His emails are very precise and very quickly too !  Also impressed with logistics team (Eddie) has been so lovely arranging delivery . Also, the notification for 'back in stock' worked brilliantly. Happy to recommend Cox & Cox

reviews.title: Rapid solution and response
reviews.body:
Rapid solution to my problem thanks to Laiba.
Question acknowledged by return and problem resolved in 24 hours

reviews.title: I ordered an item online
reviews.body: Initial order in stock. Some issues with supply chain and communication around item delivery led to my cancellation of order and delays in processing refund. Disappointing experience for a product that we were looking forward to adding to our garden. Issues resolved now.

reviews.title: I made a mistake when ordering but Zoya…
reviews.body: I made a mistake when ordering but Zoya was absolutely superb at sorting out for me. This is in direct comparison with services from a competitor of Cox & Cox so I 100% know who I will and won't be using going forward.

reviews.title: Please listen to the low reviews and be careful
reviews.body:
Please listen to the low reviews.  Communication and customer service is woeful.  

Had a partial delivery.  The delivery agent wanted to dump boxes and leave despite the order suggesting everything would be unpacked and placed where you want it. 

But the real issue was the missing items.  I finally had to contact cox to ask where my items were to be told.  They are out of stock and you will have

reviews.title: Getting desperate
reviews.body:
I'm writing a repeat review as it seems the only way to get any response. Kelly and Ashley both phoned me last time and gave great news about a direct phone number and £100 compensation for poor service but neither has materialised. 

I paid £1500 for garden furniture which arrived on 22 April minus 2 cushions. I have a verbal agreement that the cushions will be delivered on 3 June. Please can som

reviews.title: Teardrop hanging chair unable to fulfil order  twice and ended up driving to collect our own alterna
reviews.body:
We placed an order on 24th April and was due for delivery last Friday but you couldn’t deliver as insufficient space on delivery vehicle .
Promised delivery for tomorrow 22nd May email at 5:40 pm tonight to say  item isn’t in stock  due to inventory error 
Teardrop chair for teenagers birthday  great !!! shameful service 
Emailed to accept alternative no response ended up driving to collect it our

reviews.title: Order Correction
reviews.body: I realised quite quickly after I placed my order and got the confirmation that I ordered the wrong colour! Fahad was very helpful and confirmed with me which colour I actually wanted and was able to change my order with no hassle and efficiently. Thank you very much.

reviews.title: Seems like a scam company to me
reviews.body:
I received a £100 voucher from an online competition directly from cox&cox. 

I placed my order with them over a month ago now and after many attempts to chase up the whereabouts of my order - I’ve still not received it. Over the phone and on their online website chat, I have received several platitudes that ‘we need to contact the warehouse and then we’ll send you an email confirming dispatch and

reviews.title: Cox and Cox have gorgeous products at a…
reviews.body: Cox and Cox have gorgeous products at a reasonable price combined with excellent customer service. I had ordered a garden bench that was due in stock in May. When I contacted Fahad in customer services he quickly advised the product would not be available until June and then suggested a number of alternatives. Extremely friendly, helpful and very responsive.

reviews.title: Contacting customer services at Cox and Cox.
reviews.body: My problem was dealt with extremely curtiously  I forgot to include a code for my purchase and Zoya from customer service was so helpful in solving the matter. I love Cox and cox cushions and would recommend their company.

reviews.title: A great company with great prices .The…
reviews.body: A great company with great prices .The reason I haven’t given 5 stars is that it took nearly all day for a handyman to put together the bed, wardrobe and bedside drawers. I am good at DIY but it would have taken me a few days to put it all together !

reviews.title: Great value and quality bed and…
reviews.body: Great value and quality bed and mattress, we researched and you can’t best Dusk on beds. Easy to assemble too, all done in an hour.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.body: Excellent bed, amazing mattress, unbelievable price and I don't see a downside! Would recommend and have done ✅

reviews.title: Do not purchase the Ascot Ottoman Storage Bed!
reviews.body:
Please read this review and do not buy the 
Ascot Ottoman Storage Bed! This bed is faulty, I had the bed for 3 months before the bar in the middle collapsed. I contacted dusk and they sent the replacement part, however due to poor quality of items it was hard to actually repair. The staff on the phone were friendly but it took too long to sort out and made the whole experience stressful. I had to

reviews.title: Great service
reviews.body: Great service, easy to assemble and gorgeous bed with lots of storage!

reviews.title: Chairs are beautiful and look amusing…
reviews.body: Chairs are beautiful and look amusing with my table

reviews.title: 1 day late
reviews.body:
1 day late
4 nuts missing on the piuffe otherwise perfect. Thanks

reviews.title: Lana Side Table - Poor Quality
reviews.body:
The side table is not as shown in the photos.  There are stickers that cover the cam locks which have seemingly been airbrushed out in the photos on their webpage!

It looks cheap in the flesh.  A real shame as dowels and some wood glue would have led to a far better finish and done the job just as well.

reviews.title: Both items arrived damaged!
reviews.body:
Both 2 seater and pouffe arrived damaged.
Tear in fabric on sofa, scratched/damaged legs and ripped material under pouffe hanging down.
Offered £75 refund to keep both items. Wanted to exchange but have to wait another 6 weeks for delivery!

reviews.title: Poor quality
reviews.body: The bed was satisfactory on arrival, however after around a year it began to weaken and required repeated repairs, including reattaching screws. After 27 months, the bed became completely unusable and had to be disposed of. The wood appeared too soft to hold the screws securely, and several screws snapped over time, suggesting poor-quality materials. I contacted customer service, but as the produc

reviews.title: Incredible customer service
reviews.body:
Incredible customer service from
DUSK. After I’d only had my new table a week and had an issue they were so accommodating and helpful in replacing the item despite it not being directly their issue - couldn’t fault their care and understanding. Thank you so much!

reviews.title: Dusk
reviews.body: Dusk, were brilliant, from the first my first order, good communication through emails and texts, delivered when advised and the quality I was extremely happy with!

reviews.title: Dusk is my favourite company by far,
reviews.body:
Dusk is my favourite company by far,
Excellent quality furniture, beautiful bedding. Everything looks amazing 
Excellent service.
Highly recommend Dusk 
Don't hesitate to order you won't be disappointed.

reviews.title: Great product great price and quick…
reviews.body: Great product great price and quick delivery ( 2 tog Superking duvet )

reviews.title: Lovely for me and my 2 visitor dogs
reviews.body:
Love the royal blue sofa.  I am updating my curtains and soft furnishings( after 20 years )  So more comfy than the 2 armchairs I had previously.
Doing a royal blue and gold contrast .

reviews.title: When my son had an issue with the table…
reviews.body: When my son had an issue with the table I ordered for him. Customer service were very helpful and understanding and arranged for a replacement item and removal of faulty item. They were so helpful, professional and supportive. Excellent customer service.

reviews.title: The purchase was easy
reviews.body: The purchase was easy, it didn't take too long to arrive and the quality is excellent

reviews.title: Top quality product 👍
reviews.body: Top quality product 👍

reviews.title: great quality but poor service when parts missing
reviews.body: Ordered the Rachel sideboards which are beautiful but BOTH had the same piece missing, and one had the holes drilled in the wrong side so both are unusable as unable to be fully put together. Am STILL awaiting an update on whether they can source the part or send a new one two weeks later. Incredibly frustrating and radio silence from Dusk.

reviews.title: Hi it wasn't your company I was annoyed…
reviews.body: Hi it wasn't your company I was annoyed with it was the delivery driver he didn't ring my bell he just put the parcel in the dustbin wasn't  happy with that.

reviews.title: Jo and Kalman delivered our sofas come…
reviews.body: Jo and Kalman delivered our sofas come on time and good job thank you

reviews.title: Absolutely shocking experience with…
reviews.body:
Absolutely shocking experience with Furniture Village Slough branch.
We spent nearly £5,000 on a bed with an electronic lifting/storage system, and the mechanism did not even work on the very first day it was installed. The delivery and installation team from Furniture Village themselves saw that the bed was faulty and informed their aftercare team or management.
Because of this, we immediately de

reviews.title: Fantastic customer service from…
reviews.body:
Fantastic customer service from ordering to delivery.
Delivery drivers were friendly, communicative and efficient. Arrived exactly on time and sofa was in place and all packaging gone within 10 minutes.

reviews.title: Their after care service is terrible
reviews.body: Their after care service is terrible. When I had my wardrobe assembled by their team 4 years ago they seems to have not installed a component correctly which now has caused a structural collapse of the top. After complaining and requesting for this to be fixed they came up with the excuse that you have 30 days to report any fault with installation - which in my case was impossible as I didn’t real

reviews.title: Steve at the Tamworth store was very…
reviews.body:
Steve at the Tamworth store was very helpful. 
Nothing was too much trouble,  he sorted our order out quickly and efficiently.  Very pleased. 
Thank you.

reviews.title: First class service from Davie and John…
reviews.body: First class service from Davie and John today. They were very professional, friendly and super efficient. I had an ottoman bed and mattress delivered the guys assembled it and  took all the packaging away they left no mess.  Highly recommend Furniture Village and thanks again to Davie and John

reviews.title: Steve p and Ben a come and put our bed…
reviews.body: Steve p and Ben a come and put our bed up this morning. Very nice guys done it super fast and was very professional

reviews.title: Furniture Village delivery…
reviews.body:
Fabian and Stacey were polite and helpful and, removed all rubbish.

Thank you

reviews.title: Steve and Ben were brilliant!
reviews.body: Steve snd Ben were brilliant! Prompt to confirmed time, polite, took their shoes off at the door and installed the bed effortlessly! So impressed, thank you very much!

reviews.title: I have been given explanations and…
reviews.body:
I have been given explanations and details about mattress I was looking for 
Good customer care  .

reviews.title: Ben H and Jordan
reviews.body: Ben H and Jordan

reviews.title: Quick service
reviews.body: I found the bed online, I rung out the get the measurements to ensure it will fit got, got all my answers and ordered straight away.

reviews.title: Very good delivery service
reviews.body: Very good delivery service

reviews.title: Very  efficient service
reviews.body: Very  efficient service

reviews.title: Lovely team members and delivering…
reviews.body: Lovely team members and delivering services

reviews.title: Excellent service from Kiran
reviews.body: Kiran was extremely helpful today, he dealt with my query efficiently and explained he was going away to read the notes and gather detail, which I respected. Kiran also followed up with an email as promised. We still do not have a resolution for our broken sofa, but hopefully this will be followed up as Kiran promised, I believe he has done everything within his capacity.

reviews.title: Brilliant service
reviews.body: The man who served us was brilliant. He was helpful, funny and informative. He was also grounded and real. A real genuine and nice guy. The lady who took my grandson off and played with him was also great. They both made us feel welcome and like nothing was too much trouble. Would definitely shop there again.

reviews.title: My coustomer service agent Frances,was totally professional and the service was excellent.
reviews.body: My coustomer service agent Frances,was of great assistance.From start to finish.Made the purchase of my item look so easy.

reviews.title: Mike and Abdul the delivery guys were…
reviews.body: Mike and Abdul the delivery guys were professional, friendly and efficient - thank you!

reviews.title: They have done a very good job
reviews.body: They have done a very good job, happy with their service. Well done Guyz.
